global_description: A small, slender songbird with a streamlined body. It features a striking cerulean blue upper body and white underparts. The wings are dark with two white wing bars, and the tail is long and slightly forked. The bird has a small, pointed beak and a thin black eye stripe.

part_details.upper_body: Cerulean blue, smooth plumage covering the head, back, and wings.
part_details.underparts: White, clean plumage covering the chest and belly.
part_details.wings: Dark with two distinct white bars, creating a banded appearance.
part_details.tail: Long, narrow, slightly forked with dark feathers.
part_details.beak: Small, pointed, dark gray, suited for insect feeding.
part_details.eye_stripe: Thin, black, running horizontally through the eye.

spatial_relations: The cerulean blue upper body transitions into white underparts.
The dark wings feature two white bars across them.
The thin black eye stripe runs horizontally through the eye.
